'''Rakrir''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Rakririan]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="SH" /> A highly refined and meticulous species, few left their homeworld, finding the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to be too unsophisticated. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was sometimes known as '''Ballikite'''.<ref name="AE">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref>

Two notable expatriates from the planet were [[Mogoyu]], who came second in the decaped-plus category of the [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] races,<ref name="HNN52">[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]]</ref> and [[Sabodor]], who set up a boutique [[Sabodor's/Legends|petstore]] on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]].<ref name="SH" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Rakrir is stated as the homeworld of the Rakririan species in all sources except for ''Alien Encounters'' which gives Ballikite as the homeworld.
